zh.lifeSummary: 當Ferris Quenell於1587年4月17日出生在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安時，她的父親Henry Quenell III26歲，母親Beatrix Carter22歲。她於1605年5月13日與Francis Bushnell Of Horsham在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1628年3月在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可霍沙安享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Quenell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Amie, Emile.

variants.name: Quesnel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Aime, Alcide, Yves, Aurel, Aurele, Euclide, Jacques, Josee, Marcel.

French: topographic name derived from Norman, Picard quesne ‘oak tree’, or a habitational name from (Le) Quesnel, the name of several places in the north of France, named from the same word. Compare Canell and Quesnell .
History: Olivier Quesnel from Bayeux in Calvados, France, married Catherine Prudhomme (Louis and Roberte Gadois) in Montreal, QC, in 1680.

nameMeanings.name: Ferris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of the vocative case, Phiarais, of Piaras .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Ferris Quenell was born on 17 April 1587, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Quenell III, was 26 and her mother, Beatrix Carter, was 22. She married Francis Bushnell Of Horsham on 13 May 1605, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in March 1628, in Horsham, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ferris Quenell est née le 17 avril 1587, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Quenell III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Carter, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Bushnell Of Horsham le 13 mai 1605, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1628, à Horsham, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ferris Quenell am 17. April 1587 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Quenell III 26 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Carter 22. Sie hat am 13. Mai 1605 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Francis Bushnell Of Horsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1628 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Horsham, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ferris Quenell è nata il il 17 aprile 1587 nel Horsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Quenell III, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Carter, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Francis Bushnell Of Horsham il 13 maggio 1605, nel Horsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1628, nel Horsham, West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Horsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ferris Quenellが1587年4月17日にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムで生まれた時，父Henry Quenell IIIは26歳，母Beatrix Carterは22歳であった。1605年5月13日にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムでFrancis Bushnell Of Horshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1628年3月にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスホールシャムで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ferris Quenell(이)가 1587년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Quenell III(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Carter(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1605년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 Francis Bushnell Of Horsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1628년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 호르샤에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ferris Quenell nasceu em 17 de abril de 1587, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Quenell III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Carter, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Bushnell Of Horsham em 13 de maio de 1605, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1628, em Horsham, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ferris Quenell родилась 17 апреля 1587 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Quenell III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Carter, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Bushnell Of Horsham 13 мая 1605 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла марта 1628 г. в местности хауршам, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
